mood: Compassionate, residential warmth — a senior living community that feels like home, where families trust, residents flourish, and every detail signals genuine care and dignity
designRules: IDENTITY: Libre Baskerville headings at generous scale (4xl-6xl) convey warmth and trust. Botanical leaf vine pattern at 5-7% opacity as section texture via ::after pseudo-element. Cream backgrounds (#FAF6EF), never pure white. Sage green header with white text. Oak leaf SVG logo

COLOR HIERARCHY: Sage green primary (#5F7A5E) for trust and nature; rust/terracotta secondary (#B5654A) for warmth and CTAs. Gold accent (#C4882B) for highlights, badges, stars. Use primary-light (#DDE8DC) for tinted backgrounds. Warm sand (#E8DCC8) for neutral surfaces and nav buttons. Rich brown (#4A3228) for footer. Shadows use rgba(74,50,40,0.06)

LAYOUT: Video hero with crossfade playlist + static fallback. 3-column care cards with photo-forward design, accent bars, and leaf pattern bg. Stats grid with animated counters. Why section as interactive image+text carousel with prev/next arrows. Pricing cards with featured highlight. Photo grid with featured spanning item. Horizontal testimonial scroll shelf. Alternating resources layout

COMPONENTS: Cards use rounded-md (6px) with warm shadow and hover:-translate-y-1. Buttons: 14px 32px padding, 2px border, cubic-bezier hover transitions. Section tags: uppercase tracking-wider in primary green. Care cards: accent bars grow from center on hover (top + bottom, per-card colors), Learn More button fades in (opacity 0->1, translateY 12->0). Stat items: animated count-up on scroll. Leaf vine dividers between sections

INTERACTIONS: Carousel with prev/next arrows + dot navigation + image crossfade. Crisis icon pulsing ring animation (2.5s). Floating fixed help badge (bottom-right, pill shape, pulsing ring). Tour slide-in panel from right (not modal). Sticky header: hide on scroll down, show on scroll up. Mega-menu dropdowns with icon+title+description items. Testimonial infinite horizontal scroll

CONVERSION: Sticky green header with sand Schedule a Tour button that opens slide-in panel. Video hero as emotional hook. Phone number always visible. Crisis band for urgent families with pulse animation. Resource download CTAs in alternating layout. Empathetic language throughout — 'community' not 'facility', 'loved one' not 'patient'. Accreditation badges for trust signals

designPatterns.card: <div className="bg-white rounded-md p-8 border border-text/5 shadow-sm hover:shadow-lg hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-all duration-300" style="box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(74,50,40,0.06)">
designPatterns.button: <a className="bg-primary text-white font-semibold px-8 py-3.5 rounded-md text-base shadow-md hover:opacity-90 hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-all">
designPatterns.buttonSecondary: <a className="bg-secondary text-white font-semibold px-8 py-3.5 rounded-md text-base shadow-md hover:opacity-90 hover:-translate-y-0.5 transition-all">
designPatterns.heading: <h2 className="font-heading text-4xl sm:text-5xl font-bold text-text tracking-tight text-center" style="text-wrap: balance">
designPatterns.badge: <span className="inline-flex items-center gap-2 bg-primary/10 border border-primary/15 rounded-full px-4 py-1.5 text-sm font-semibold text-primary uppercase tracking-wider">
designPatterns.input: <input className="w-full bg-white border border-text/15 rounded-md px-4 py-3 text-text placeholder:text-muted focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary/30 focus:border-primary/30 transition font-body" />
designPatterns.navStyle: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-primary text-white shadow-md
designPatterns.iconBox: <div className="h-14 w-14 rounded-lg bg-primary/10 flex items-center justify-center text-primary">
designPatterns.careCardAccent: <span className="absolute top-0 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 h-1.5 w-0 bg-primary transition-[width] duration-500 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1)] group-hover:w-full" />
designPatterns.tourPanel: <div className="fixed top-0 right-0 w-[440px] h-full bg-white translate-x-full transition-transform duration-400 ease-[cubic-bezier(0.22,1,0.36,1)] data-[open]:translate-x-0" />
designPatterns.helpBadge: <a className="fixed bottom-8 right-8 z-[9999] flex items-center gap-2.5 px-6 py-4 bg-secondary text-white rounded-full font-bold shadow-lg" />
